content:
💡 opc-skills | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To empower solopreneurs and one-person companies by providing ready-to-use automation skills that enhance the functionality of AI coding assistants for tasks like marketing, content creation, and research.
✨ Key Features: • Extensible AI agent skills for various coding assistants
📖 Summary: OPC Skills provides a collection of pre-built AI agent "skills" designed to enhance the capabilities of AI assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. These skills are self-contained modules containing instructions, scripts, and resources that AI agents can dynamically load to perform specialized tasks, making them more powerful for solopreneurs and one-person companies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ jmeter | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: Performance and load testing of applications and services to measure their strength and analyze overall performance under simulated heavy loads.
✨ Key Features: • Performance and load testing for web applications, web services, FTP, JDBC, LDAP, MOM, Mail, and more • Fully featured Test IDE for recording, building, and debugging test plans • Command-line mode (non-GUI) for load testing from any Java-compatible OS
📖 Summary: Apache JMeter is an open-source Java application designed for performance and load testing of various services. It simulates heavy loads to analyze application strength and performance under different conditions, offering a comprehensive feature set for detailed testing and reporting.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 GLM-Image | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: High-fidelity and knowledge-intensive image generation from text, with advanced capabilities in text rendering and a comprehensive suite of image-to-image editing and manipulation functionalities.
✨ Key Features: • Hybrid autoregressive + diffusion decoder architecture • 9B-parameter autoregressive generator initialized from GLM-4-9B-0414
📖 Summary: GLM-Image is an advanced image generation model that utilizes a hybrid autoregressive and diffusion decoder architecture. It excels in generating high-fidelity images, particularly those requiring precise semantic understanding, complex information expression, and accurate text rendering, while also supporting a wide array of image-to-image tasks.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 LLMRouter | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Optimizing LLM inference by intelligently routing queries to the most appropriate language model.
✨ Key Features: • Smart Routing: Automatically routes queries to the optimal LLM based on task complexity, cost, and performance.
📖 Summary: LLMRouter is an open-source Python library designed for intelligent routing of Large Language Model (LLM) inferences. It dynamically selects the most suitable LLM for a given query based on factors like complexity, cost, and performance, supporting over 16 diverse routing models and offering a unified CLI for training, inference, and chat.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ tuitube | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading videos from various online platforms through an easy-to-use text-based interface.
✨ Key Features: • TUI for video downloads • Supports YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, Instagram, Bilibili, and more • Uses yt-dlp CLI for downloading • Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Windows)
📖 Summary: Tuitube is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that provides a Text User Interface (TUI) for downloading videos from various popular platforms like YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, and Instagram. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to handle the actual downloading process.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
